"'''One Step Ahead'''" is a short story written by [[Michael Stern]], originally published in the [[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back (Second Edition)|second edition]] of ''[[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back]]''. It was later archived on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].

==Plot summary==
[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] attempt to escape [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] during the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Imperial attack]]. [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] are chasing the group and C-3PO begins lagging behind. After turning a corner, C-3PO comes across a sealed [[Blast door/Legends|blast door]] with a yellow and orange hazard label pasted on it. Feeling a brief moment of boldness, C-3PO tears off the label and continues his run. The pursuing stormtroopers, led by a headstrong veteran of the [[Akuria II]] [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]], reach the sealed door and head in. Sometime later [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] observes the chamber behind the door whose rear wall has now been caved in. Under the piles of blood-stained snow are some of his most well trained troops. Vader asks his [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] whether they are [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] troops, to which the lieutenant responds "I don't think so, sir."
